calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Greenstone of Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP telephone number 310-201-9150 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Millie Urrutia.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MILLIE URRUTIA'S Motion For Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
